tasks.name: Create AssessmentWidgetData type
tasks.purpose: Define the data contract for assessment spider chart widget, mapping category_scores JSONB to chart format

constraints: Must match survey_responses.category_scores JSONB structure
Must be nullable to handle users without completed assessment
Structure should map to Recharts RadarChart data format: { category: string, score: number }[]

tasks.input_state: Dashboard types file exists from S1823.I1.F1 with DashboardData interface
tasks.output_state: AssessmentWidgetData interface exported from dashboard.types.ts with categoryScores field (Record<string, number> | null)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: TypeScript interface exists with categoryScores field and compiles without errors

tasks.name: Create assessment scores loader function
tasks.purpose: Fetch category_scores from survey_responses table for self-assessment survey type with RLS enforcement

constraints: Must use RLS-enforced client (not admin client)
Must use cache() wrapper for per-request memoization
Query survey_responses table where survey_id = 'self-assessment' and completed = true
Return null if no completed assessment exists
Extract category_scores JSONB field

tasks.input_state: AssessmentWidgetData type is defined, survey_responses table exists with RLS policies
tasks.output_state: loadAssessmentScores function exported from assessment-scores.loader.ts, queries survey_responses, returns AssessmentWidgetData or null
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader function compiles, fetches category_scores with RLS, returns null for users without completed assessment

tasks.name: Create AssessmentSpiderWidgetSkeleton component
tasks.purpose: Provide a loading state UI using Skeleton component that matches the spider chart widget layout

constraints: Must match populated widget dimensions
Must be server component
Skeleton should approximate spider chart shape (circular with radiating axes)

tasks.output_state: AssessmentSpiderWidgetSkeleton component exported, renders Card with circular Skeleton placeholders for radar chart and title
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Skeleton component exists and matches widget layout dimensions with circular placeholder

tasks.name: Create AssessmentSpiderWidget populated state
tasks.purpose: Display assessment category scores using existing RadarChart component wrapped in Card with proper data transformation

constraints: Must import and reuse existing RadarChart component
Must transform categoryScores Record<string, number> to RadarChart's CategoryScores format
Must be server component wrapper with client-side RadarChart
Card title should be 'Assessment Results'

tasks.input_state: Loader function exists and returns AssessmentWidgetData, existing RadarChart component available
tasks.output_state: AssessmentSpiderWidget component displays spider chart using RadarChart component with transformed category scores data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget renders with real data, RadarChart displays category scores on spider/radar axes, chart is interactive
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm dev # Manual: Navigate to /home, verify spider chart renders with category labels

tasks.name: Add empty state to AssessmentSpiderWidget

action.target: empty state UI for no assessment completed

tasks.purpose: Display friendly message and CTA when user has not completed self-assessment survey

constraints: Must check if categoryScores is null before rendering
Must show encouraging message like 'Discover your strengths'
CTA button links to /home/assessment/survey

tasks.output_state: Widget shows empty state Card with message 'Complete your assessment to see your skill profile' and 'Take Assessment' button when data is null
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state renders when loader returns null, button links to assessment survey correctly
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck # Manual: Test with user account that has no completed survey_responses

tasks.name: Wire AssessmentSpiderWidget to dashboard loader

action.target: widget to dashboard page with Suspense

tasks.purpose: Integrate widget into dashboard.loader.ts parallel fetching and add to dashboard page grid with loading boundary

constraints: Must add loadAssessmentScores to Promise.all in dashboard loader
Must wrap widget in Suspense boundary with skeleton fallback
Widget must be positioned in second grid cell (row 1, col 2)
Must update DashboardData type to include assessmentScores property

tasks.input_state: Widget component complete with all states, loader function exists, dashboard loader infrastructure exists (from S1823.I1.F1)
tasks.output_state: Dashboard loader includes assessmentScores in parallel fetch, DashboardData type updated, page.tsx renders widget in grid with Suspense boundary
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget appears on /home dashboard in correct grid position (second cell), loading skeleton shows during fetch, spider chart displays correctly with data
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm dev # Navigate to /home, verify widget renders in second grid position with radar chart
